title: Sashimi-cut Ukrainian Haddock Pierogi
description: Delicate sashimi-cut Ukrainian haddock is wrapped in crispy pierogi dough and served with a side of sour cream.
instructions: Cut the haddock fillets into thin slices.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and egg.
Add the warm water to the flour mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece of dough into a thin circle.
Place a haddock slice in the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with butter.
Fold the dough over the haddock to form a half-circle.
Press the edges together to seal the pierogi.
Repeat with the remaining dough and haddock.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the pierogi for 5 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Serve the pierogi hot with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of dill.
